docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) BRUNO MATOS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLEANERIFIC, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CLEANERIFIC, LLC IS PRESENT AND APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF IS BRUNO MATOS. DEFENDANT JOSE MONCADA IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2026 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,250.00 FILED BY CLEANERIFIC, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MONCADA, JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLEANERIFIC, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONCADA, JOSE $6,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,325.00, COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF MORE CREDIBLE THAN DEFENDANT GIVEN THE INSTAGRAM POSTS. TOTAL $6,325.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT CLEANERIFIC, LLC RECOVER FROM APPELLANT MONCADA, JOSE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,575.00 NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # A5626324D001, TAG # 038335 BY DEFENDANT MONCADA, JOSE
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT MONCADA, JOSE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MONCADA, JOSE
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT MONCADA, JOSE MAILED TO RESPONDENT CLEANERIFIC, LLC
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR MAR-04-2026 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2026 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - NO JUDGE PRO TEM AVAILABLE. (D206)
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2026 - ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIM APPEALS ON MAR-04-2026 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 606. JUDGE STEPHEN MURPHY. (D206)
JUDGMENT CREDITOR REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLEANERIFIC, LLC COPY GIVEN TO ACCOUNTING

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2026 BY STEPHEN M. MURPHY. PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT CLEANERIFIC, LLC APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY BRUNO MATOS AND MARIANA SERAPHIM. DEFENDANT/APPELLANT JOSE MONCADA APPEARED, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PILAR ESPINOSA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: HON. STEPHEN M. MURPHY; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED (606)
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-04-26 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 606
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2026 - JUDGMENT ENTERED.
